summary: Tested coupon deletion with confirmation modal, toggle active/inactive status, and comprehensive analytics features. All backend APIs and frontend UI features working correctly.

Delete Coupon Confirmation Modal.details: Modal shows coupon code, warning message, requires typing exact coupon code to confirm. Delete button is disabled until code matches. Cancel button works correctly.

Toggle Coupon Active/Inactive Status.details: Clicking status badge (Active/Inactive) toggles the coupon status. Toast notification confirms the action. UI updates immediately.

Analytics Tab - Summary Cards.details: Shows 4 summary cards: Total Uses, Total Cart Value, Total Discount Given, Unique Customers. Empty state handled gracefully with 0 values.

Analytics Tab - Coupon Performance Table.details: Table shows each coupon with columns: Code, Uses, Customers, Cart Value, Discount Given, Net Revenue, Avg Cart, Status. Empty state message shown when no usage data.

Analytics Tab - Recent Usage/Invoice Det.details: Shows list of orders that used coupons with user email, order ID, cart value, discount amount, timestamp. Empty state message shown when no usage logs.

Per-Coupon Usage History (Eye Icon).details: Clicking Eye icon expands coupon card to show Usage History section. Shows individual usage entries or 'No usage history found' message.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Delete confirmation modal properly requires typing exact coupon code
✓ Toggle endpoint correctly flips is_active status and returns new state
✓ Performance endpoint aggregates usage data with proper summary statistics
✓ Usage endpoint supports filtering by coupon code
✓ Frontend handles empty states gracefully for all analytics sections
✓ All data-testid attributes present for key interactive elements

test_credentials.note: Admin 2FA login requires OTP from email or database

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test coupons (TEST* prefix) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coupon analytics and management features fully functional. Delete confirmation requires typing exact coupon code. Toggle status works via clicking Active/Inactive badge. Analytics tab shows summary cards and performance table (empty state when no usage data). Per-coupon usage history accessible via Eye icon on each coupon card.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected.
